div.p: Scalar-valued autograd engine with reverse-mode automatic differentiation

g.text: M1 | neural-network-basic-m1 | Value Class with Autograd
M2 | neural-network-basic-m2 | Backward Pass & Gradient Verification
M3 | neural-network-basic-m3 | Neuron, Layer, and MLP

div.p: a = Value(2.0) b = Value(3.0) c = a * b + a # c = 8.0
Order: [a, b, intermediate, c] Reverse: [c, intermediate, b, a]

Training Sequence (per epoch) python for epoch in range(epochs): # 1. Forward pass preds = [network(x) for x in X] # 2. Compute loss loss = mse_loss(preds, Y) # 3. Zero gradients (CRITICAL) optimizer.zero_grad() # 4. Backward pass loss.backward() # 5. Update parameters optimizer.step()
NOT: p = p - Value(lr) * p.grad (would create new object, leak memory)
